'''Kabaira''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Teilcam system]] with damp, foggy weather. Its vast [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] were interrupted by some 2 million [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] islands, of which only a few in the southern hemisphere were active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. There were two northern island-continents: [[Belshain]] and [[Madieri]]. Some of the planet's [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]] were capped with snow and home to [[Snow-wolf|snow-wolves]]. [[Delgas Medical]] and [[Hydrospeare Corporation]] were headquartered on Kabaira. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Eponte Spaceport]], which was known for [[Drayhar's Cantina]]. The local day consisted of 23 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]]; the local [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of 341 local [[Standard day/Legends|days]]. [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] inhabited the planet. There was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cell on the planet. This planet was also the birthplace of the [[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport]], which had been an extensive modification of the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]] executed by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] garrison stationed on the planet.
